items.title: Solana lands Mastercard, Western Union on new dev platform
items.whyYouShouldCare: The partnership with Mastercard and Western Union enhances Solana's credibility and could drive institutional interest, boosting liquidity and ecosystem development.

items.title: Mastercard, Western Union tap Solana Foundation’s new enterprise developer toolbox
items.whyYouShouldCare: Mastercard and Western Union's involvement with Solana's developer toolbox signifies strong institutional backing, which may lead to increased usage and innovation within the ecosystem.

items.title: Solana Foundation taps Mastercard, Western Union, Worldpay for institutional developer platform
items.whyYouShouldCare: Engagement from major players like Mastercard and Worldpay positions Solana as a key player in enterprise solutions, potentially expanding its market reach and user base.
